docs.title: External System Services Governance
docs.service_inventory: Maintained register of external/third-party services (AWS, Datadog, PagerDuty, Stripe) with data classification and FedRAMP/SOC 2 status
docs.security_requirements: Contractual security requirements and SLAs enforced via signed agreements; providers must hold FedRAMP authorization or an equivalent attestation
docs.monitoring_process: Provider security posture and SLA adherence reviewed quarterly; incident-notification clauses monitored
